summary:
Cavity varnishes are mainly utilized for their ability to enhance mineral deposition through fluoridation, protect against acid exposure, and manage existing carious lesions effectively without invasive procedures such as filling placements directly addressing how they prevent further damage caused by acidity penetrating deep within enamel structure.
\]
 The final answer remains aligned closely but now more robustly supported based upon detailed analysis indicating primary utility lies heavily weighted towards reducing acid entry via physical barriers created post-application onto compromised surfaces.
To ensure clarity while adhering strictly per your instructions regarding summary length constraints—
